title: Üsküdar Çarşı Campus
content:
By clicking on the headings below,

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Üsküdar University Çarşı Campus is located in the very center of Üsküdar, one of the most historical districts of Istanbul.

Located within the borders of Üsküdar Mimar Sinan Neighborhood, Çarşı Campus has an important location in land and sea transportation such as Marmaray, Üsküdar-Çekmeköy Metro and city lines.

Üsküdar University Çarşı Campus provides an important convenience with its transportation options.

Address

Üsküdar University Çarşı Campus, Mimar Sinan Mah. Selman-ı Pak Cad. Uskudar

Transportation to Bazaar Campus

TRANSPORTATION BY METROBUS Transportation by Metrobus provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and crossing the road through the overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Kısıklı Street and turn to İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Street. You can reach the Çarşı Campus from bus and minibus stops with the bus numbers specified in Public Transportation (10 minutes by public transportation)

Transportation by Ferry and Motorboat

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü Piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. A 5-minute walk will take you to the Bazaar Campus at Selman-ı Pak Street No:4.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

Coming from D-100 - Edirne/Topkapi Direction:

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar-Kadıköy Turnoff (second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue to Kısıklı Street and then Selman-ı Pak Street to reach the Bazaar Campus at No:4.

Arriving from D-100 - Ankara Direction:

Take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar- Ümraniye before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge. Continue left at the intersection. Continue on Kısıklı Street and cross to Selman-ı Pak Street and arrive at the Bazaar Campus at No:4.

Arrival from TEM Highway:

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the highway. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and cross Selman-ı Pak Street and arrive at the Bazaar Campus at No:4.

*** Our directional signs are hanging on the lampposts to help you in and around Altunizade.
